hypothesis: Rejecting stale structured references and forcing a fresh observation will reduce wrong-target clicks after dynamic page mutations.

trace_evidence.finding: The page re-rendered before the click and the old element reference resolved to a different control.

suspected_root_cause: Element references are not scoped to a browser-state epoch.

treatment.description: Attach observation epochs to structured references and fail closed when the epoch is stale.
activation_evidence: Smoke task logs a stale_reference action result before re-observation.

acceptance_criteria.primary: predeclared improvement after baseline variance calibration
